title: schoenoplectus quinquefarius
intro: Schoenoplectus quinquefarius, also known as five-angled bulrush or five-angled cattail, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the cattail family. Traditionally, the rhizomes and roots of the plant have been used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Schoenoplectus quinquefarius include treating kidney stones, reducing swelling, and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use by boiling the roots and rhizomes in water to make a decoction, which can be used as a treatment for various health conditions.
